# defectdojo_engagement_preset (Data Source)

DefectDojo Engagement Preset data source

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_engagement_preset" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `network_locations` (Set of Number) IDs of network locations
- `notes` (String) Description of what needs to be tested
- `product` (Number) ID of the Product this Preset belongs to
- `scope` (String) Scope of Engagement testing
- `test_type` (Set of Number) IDs of test types
- `title` (String) Brief description of preset
